design_philosophy: Control Room aesthetic. Objective, rigid, and functional. Data is the hero. Use a strict bento grid ('Grid Borders' pattern) exposing the skeleton of the UI. Eliminate unnecessary padding around cards, use 1px sharp borders. High-contrast monochromatic baseline with singular functional accents to guide the user's eye.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Control Room Grid (Mode B). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Strict hierarchy, gap-4 to gap-6. Every pixel must be utilized.
spacing_and_layout.surface_strategy: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Use border-collapse style layouts. Items have border-r border-b border-border/40. No soft shadows. Rely on 1px solid strokes.
spacing_and_layout.optical_alignment: Left-align dense content, forms, and tabular data. Top-left F-pattern scanning priority.

header.classes: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 border-b border-white/10

cards.classes: bg-transparent border border-zinc-800 rounded-none hover:border-zinc-700 transition-colors

buttons.primary: bg-amber-500 text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wide rounded-none hover:bg-amber-600 transition-colors active:scale-[0.98]
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-900 text-white border border-zinc-800 font-medium rounded-none hover:bg-zinc-800 transition-colors
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-zinc-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-zinc-800 rounded-none transition-colors

inputs.classes: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 text-white rounded-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-amber-500 focus:border-amber-500 placeholder:text-zinc-500 font-mono text-sm h-10 px-3

tables.header_cell: px-4 py-3 text-left font-mono text-xs text-zinc-400 uppercase tracking-wider

badges.classes: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono font-bold uppercase rounded-none border

icons.instructions: Use Phosphor Icons for a technical, crisp look suitable for dense dashboards.

motion.hover_states: Crisp and instant. Background shifts and border color changes. No bouncy transforms.
motion.page_transitions: Fade and slight slide-up (opacity 0 -> 1, y 10 -> 0) using framer-motion.
motion.loading: Terminal-style progress bars or glowing indeterminate lines. Avoid generic spinners.

images.description: Abstract empty state illustration for the scraper search page before a search is executed.
Cinematic data nodes background. Use with a heavy dark overlay (e.g., bg-black/80) in the AI Assistant chat tab to give a premium tech feel.
Abstract neural network visualization. Can be used in onboarding modals, login screens, or AI interaction states.

media.image_usage_rules: Never use images at full opacity if text sits on top. Always use 'bg-black/80' or a heavy gradient overlay. Images are primarily for textural mood.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for normal text. Use the provided text_primary (#FFFFFF) against background (#09090B).
accessibility.focus: focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-amber-500 focus:border-amber-500 focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-amber-500 on all interactive elements.
accessibility.test_ids: Every button, input, tab, and row MUST have a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case role-based (e.g., 'data-testid="search-submit-button"').

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a 'Control Room' style SaaS dashboard for a Business Intelligence Scraper.
Do NOT use 'Inter' font. Implement Cabinet Grotesk for headings, IBM Plex Sans for body, and JetBrains Mono for data points/tables.
Ensure the UI uses 'rounded-none' for sharp, brutalist, technical edges.
Implement Shadcn UI heavily, but strip out the soft Vercel shadows and rounded borders. Replace them with strict 1px solid borders (border-zinc-800).
For the two main tabs (Scraper & AI Assistant), use Shadcn Tabs but style them like terminal tabs or command palettes.
When integrating Apify and displaying results, prioritize density. Use the 'Grid Borders' strategy for the results cards or display them in a dense table layout.
Implement data-testid attributes universally for testing reliability.
Do NOT add decorative gradients. The UI should be 95% grayscale with the primary color (Electric Amber #F59E0B) used strictly for actions and status indicators.
